result.status_detail: APF block page replaces notion.so/chat — warning visible (page replacement delivery)
result.page_text_observed:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)

notes: APF v2.2.4 (d29d868 property-driven refactor) — Production verify for 'notion' service. Initial navigation to https://www.notion.so/chat loaded Notion AI chat UI successfully (logged in as 최장희's Space, chat input rendered). After mandatory hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), APF intercepted at the domain/page level and replaced the chat UI with the static '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' (Security Policy - Access Blocked) block page. Same delivery mechanism as #882 (you.com). Page text contains expected_text='차단' keyword and full Korean+English warning ('⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / This request was blocked due to sensitive information.'). DOM has zero interactive elements — pure static replacement. Mission anchor satisfied: PII prompt scenario protected since user cannot reach chat UI to submit the prompt (intercept fires pre-submission at domain/page level). Verdict=OK per criteria 'warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied'. PII prompt was NOT submitted because page-replacement intercept fires earlier in the flow than per-message blocking would. v2.2.4 d29d868 fix verified successful for notion service.
